name: sidekick
description: Sidekick — a collection of AI coding agents as Codex sidekicks. Forge and Kay are the first two: each sidekick auto-installs, configures itself, and lets Codex delegate coding work while Codex stays focused on planning and communication. The Codex package keeps the workflow bodies in skills.

interface.shortDescription: AI coding-agent sidekick workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Sidekick packages the shared Sidekick workflows for Codex while keeping the source of truth in the main Sidekick repository. The workflow bodies live in skills, and Codex-specific behavior stays in the existing shared files behind host-aware conditionals.
defaultPrompt: Use Sidekick to coordinate implementation work.
